steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: The function $f(x)=42-0.25x$ gives the estimated height $x$ days after the start of the project. The constant term is the value when $x=0$.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: Evaluate the model at the start: $$ f(0)=42-0.25(0)=42 $$ So $42$ is the estimated height at the start of the project. The answer is A.
